notableEvents.label: Austin Riley GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Michael Harris II out at 2nd. Austin Riley out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Ronald Acuña Jr. picked off and caught stealing 3rd base, pitcher José Alvarado to shortstop Trea Turner.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith strikes out swinging, catcher Rafael Marchán to first baseman Bryce Harper.
